response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior/staff individual contributor with genuinely relevant developer-tooling experience (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP code generators) and clearly exceeds the 8-year development requirement. However, this is a Level II people-management role requiring 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of formal technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of managing people, running one-on-ones, owning team roadmaps, or leading organizational change. Community teaching and workshop facilitation suggest mentorship aptitude but do not substitute for management experience at this level.
strengths: Deep developer-tools background: built test runners (Trial), assertion libraries, CI/CD and GitLab infrastructure, and AI-agent/MCP tooling
15+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency systems, well above the 8-year minimum
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through courses, workshops, refactoring dojos, and conference talks
concerns: No formal people-management experience; the role requires at least 2 years managing or leading a team
No demonstrated experience setting team priorities, performance expectations, or leading organizational change
Mobile experience is app-level (iOS/Apple TV) rather than mobile-platform build/test infrastructure at ecosystem scale

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test infrastructure expertise
No organizational leadership or roadmap ownership track record
